sub: REMOV is a place to search, review, and track the movies and series you love all in one place.

mission.label: Story
mission.title: Why we created REMOV
mission.paragraph1: REMOV started from my own passion for movies. Whenever I watched something great, I wanted to share my feelings and reviews with others who shared the same interest. But the issue was, we didn't know what kind of movies our friends liked, whether they watched the same things, or had similar tastes.
mission.paragraph2: So I wanted to create REMOV as a platform for movie lovers, allowing users to save what they watch, write reviews, share thoughts, discover new titles easily, and connect with people who have similar tastes.

features.label: Features
features.title: What you can do on REMOV

reviews.title: Reviews & Ratings
reviews.desc: Write reviews and rate movies/series you watch. Share opinions with the community.

watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.desc: Save titles you want to watch and track what you've seen. Organize your collection.

achievements.title: Achievement
achievements.desc: Unlock achievements based on your viewing habits, collect awards, and challenge yourself.

community.title: Community
community.desc: Follow other users and see their reviews on your activity feed. Discover new perspectives.

metadata.title: Full Information
metadata.desc: Access details for thousands of titles from TMDB, complete with ratings, cast, and trailers.

removScore.title: REMOV Score
removScore.desc: Rating scores aggregated from the REMOV user community, providing a separate perspective.

tech.label: Tech Stack
tech.title: Behind the Development
tech.desc: REMOV is developed using Go (Fiber, GORM, PostgreSQL) on the Backend, and Vue 3 (Composition API, TypeScript, Pinia, TanStack Query) on the Frontend.

creator.label: Developer
creator.name: Arin Sudakijjathorn
creator.bio: IT student passionate about building Full-stack products and watching movies

cta.title: Like REMOV?
cta.desc: If you would like to support the development of this project, click the button below.
